articles.title: Browser issues: pages won't load, certificate errors, or constant crashes
articles.escalation_trigger: Same site fails for many users, or genuine cert issue on internal service, or DNS poisoning suspected

articles.title: Suspicious email / suspected phishing — what to do
articles.escalation_trigger: User clicked link or entered credentials, or executive impersonation, or active BEC suspected

articles.title: Can't sign in to Microsoft 365 / repeated password prompts
articles.escalation_trigger: AADSTS50053 (account locked), AADSTS50126, or pattern across multiple users on same tenant

articles.title: Microsoft 365 license / activation issues — apps in reduced functionality
articles.escalation_trigger: License unassigned in admin center or tenant has no available licenses for required SKU

articles.title: Multi-factor authentication (MFA): setup, lost device, and recovery
articles.escalation_trigger: User locked out with no recovery method, or admin reset required for MFA, or token replay/abuse suspected

articles.title: OneDrive not syncing / paused / stuck on 'looking for changes'
articles.escalation_trigger: Sync error code 0x8004... persists after reset, or pattern across multiple users on same tenant

articles.title: Restore deleted or modified file from OneDrive / version history
articles.escalation_trigger: File deleted >93 days ago, or ransomware detected on tenant, or shared library file requires admin restore

articles.title: OneDrive sync conflict — 'two copies of file' / file with computer name appended
articles.escalation_trigger: Conflict pattern affects shared library and multiple users; needs admin merge tooling

articles.title: Outlook not receiving new emails
articles.escalation_trigger: Send/Receive returns 0x8004... errors, or issue affects multiple users in same tenant

articles.title: Outlook can't send emails / messages stuck in Outbox
articles.escalation_trigger: Multiple users on same tenant cannot send, or NDR shows 5.7.x policy violation, or DKIM/SPF/DMARC failure

articles.title: Password reset / forgotten password (self-service)
articles.escalation_trigger: User cannot complete SSPR (no verification methods or expired), or admin reset required, or local-account-only PC with lost password

articles.title: Printer not printing / job stuck in queue
articles.escalation_trigger: Print server side error, or driver requires admin install, or hardware error code on display

articles.title: Printer prints garbled / unreadable / wrong characters
articles.escalation_trigger: Replacing driver doesn't resolve, or print server queue produces same output for all users

articles.title: Microsoft Teams: no audio in meetings (mic or speaker not working)
articles.escalation_trigger: USB audio device not detected by Windows at all (driver/hardware), or all users on tenant report similar

articles.title: Microsoft Teams won't load / stuck on splash screen
articles.escalation_trigger: Reinstall fails, Teams admin center reports incident, or all users on tenant unable to load

articles.title: VPN won't connect / disconnects randomly
articles.escalation_trigger: Multiple users in same office / region cannot connect, or certificate revoked, or VPN gateway error reported by client

articles.title: Wi-Fi: can't connect / shows 'no internet, secured' / yellow triangle
articles.escalation_trigger: Issue affects multiple users on same SSID, or network adapter shows error code 10/12/43, or DHCP exhaustion suspected

articles.title: Blue screen of death (BSOD) on Windows 10/11
articles.escalation_trigger: BSOD repeats more than 3 times in 24h, occurs during boot before login, or shows DISK or NTFS-related stop codes

articles.title: Windows won't boot — stuck on spinning dots or black screen
articles.escalation_trigger: BitLocker recovery key prompt appears, or boot fails after 2 startup-repair cycles, or storage SMART warnings present

articles.title: Computer running slow / performance lag
articles.escalation_trigger: Performance issue persists after L1 cleanup, or task manager shows 100% disk usage with no identifiable process

articles.title: Disk full / out of space on C: drive
articles.escalation_trigger: Cleanup recovers <5% on a 256 GB+ drive, or hidden files / WinSxS bloat needs admin tools

articles.title: Windows: no sound at all from the computer
articles.escalation_trigger: Audio device not detected after driver reinstall, or hardware failure suspected

articles.title: An app won't open / closes immediately / shows error on launch
articles.escalation_trigger: Multiple apps fail to launch (system-wide), or specific app crashes after reinstall

articles.title: Active Directory: account lockout / repeating lockouts after password change
articles.escalation_trigger: Lockout source unidentifiable, or service account, or pattern across many accounts (possible attack)

articles.title: Conditional Access blocking sign-in (AADSTS53003 / 53000)
articles.escalation_trigger: Policy change required affecting >10 users, or break-glass account also blocked, or signs of token replay attack

articles.title: BitLocker: recovery key retrieval and re-protection
articles.escalation_trigger: No recovery key in any directory; data may be unrecoverable. Or hardware platform regression after BIOS update.

articles.title: Device deployment: Autopilot, image hygiene, app rings
articles.escalation_trigger: Pilot fails wide rollout, or Autopilot service incident, or compliance gap on deployment

articles.title: DHCP scope exhaustion / clients getting APIPA / lease conflicts
articles.escalation_trigger: Rogue DHCP detected, or fleet IP conflicts, or scope cannot be expanded due to subnet limits

articles.title: DNS: internal name resolution failing / split-brain issues
articles.escalation_trigger: Replication failure, root hint corruption, or DNS poisoning suspected

articles.title: Driver rollback / WHQL gating / fleet driver management
articles.escalation_trigger: Bad driver hits >5% of fleet, or BSOD pattern after Windows Update, or vendor regression

articles.title: Defender ASR rules / Attack Surface Reduction tuning
articles.escalation_trigger: Mass block on legitimate business app or ASR rule conflict with business workflow

articles.title: Exchange Online: mail flow troubleshooting / NDR analysis
articles.escalation_trigger: Tenant-wide mail flow outage, or domain reputation block, or DMARC enforcement failure

articles.title: Intune device compliance: device shows non-compliant or fails to enroll
articles.escalation_trigger: Mass enrollment failure, or compliance regression after policy change, or Autopilot ESP timeout

articles.title: Malware / suspected infection: triage and containment
articles.escalation_trigger: Ransomware, lateral movement detected, exfiltration suspected, or executive workstation

articles.title: Network troubleshooting: latency, packet loss, MTU, switching
articles.escalation_trigger: Pattern points to ISP, infrastructure replacement needed, or capacity exhausted

articles.title: User offboarding: identity disable, data preservation, license recovery
articles.escalation_trigger: Hostile termination, regulated industry retention, or executive/privileged user

articles.title: New user onboarding: account, license, device, and access provisioning
articles.escalation_trigger: Onboarding for executive / regulated user, or HR system integration failure

articles.title: Performance deep dive: WPR / xperf / consistent slowness diagnosis
articles.escalation_trigger: Trace shows kernel-mode driver or firmware issue requiring vendor

articles.title: NTFS / file share permissions: access denied, broken inheritance, audit
articles.escalation_trigger: Cross-forest, broken ACL on critical share, or active investigation/audit

articles.title: Print server / queue management / Universal Print rollout
articles.escalation_trigger: PrintNightmare-class CVE in environment, or print server compromise, or fleet-wide outage

articles.title: Remote Desktop (RDP) / RDS connection issues
articles.escalation_trigger: Mass RDS outage, license server failure, or session host capacity exhausted

articles.title: SharePoint Online: permissions, broken inheritance, sharing audit
articles.escalation_trigger: Site collection-wide permission corruption, or external sharing risk audit, or compliance review

articles.title: VPN gateway, certificates, and Always-On profile management
articles.escalation_trigger: Gateway capacity exhausted, or PKI compromise, or fleet-wide cert reissuance

articles.title: Windows user profile corrupted / temp profile / rebuild
keywords: we can't sign in to your account
articles.escalation_trigger: Roaming profile / FSLogix corruption affecting multiple users

articles.title: Immutable / air-gapped backup design (anti-ransomware)
articles.escalation_trigger: Active ransomware event, restore validation failure, immutable tier compromised

articles.title: Internal PKI / cert lifecycle / autoenroll / OCSP
articles.escalation_trigger: CA compromise, root CA recovery, mass cert reissue

articles.title: Azure tenant + subscription design / landing zones
articles.escalation_trigger: Tenant restructure, sovereignty constraint, M&A integration

articles.title: Disaster recovery runbook: RTO/RPO, restore order, validation
articles.escalation_trigger: Real disaster, ransomware-induced restore, regulatory deadline

articles.title: Endpoint security architecture: EDR + AppLocker/WDAC + Windows Hardening
articles.escalation_trigger: Strategic shift, vendor selection, mass roll-out planning

articles.title: Enterprise / MSP architecture: multi-tenant operations, segregation, automation
articles.escalation_trigger: Cross-tenant breach, contractual SLA breach, regulatory change

articles.title: Hybrid AD: Azure AD Connect / Cloud Sync / password writeback
articles.escalation_trigger: Sync engine corruption, federation outage, mass attribute conflict

articles.title: Network architecture: segmentation, zero trust, hub-and-spoke / SD-WAN
articles.escalation_trigger: Architectural change, vendor hardware EOL, mass remediation

articles.title: Security incident response runbook (P1 cyber incident)
articles.escalation_trigger: Always engage executive leadership for P1; engage cyber-insurance, legal, external IR firm

articles.title: Windows Server: role health, patching strategy, sysprep / reference image
articles.escalation_trigger: Cluster split-brain, storage corruption, datacenter-wide outage

articles.title: SSO / SAML / OIDC: federation troubleshooting
articles.escalation_trigger: Federation-wide outage, IdP cert compromise, SAML response replay attack

articles.title: Booking appointments online (medical, restaurant, services)
Personal budgeting basics (50/30/20, tracking, common tools)
Safe online checkout — payment options ranked
Explaining technology in simple language (analogies + framing)
Filling out forms online safely
Detecting fake / scam websites and phishing pages
Helping seniors / non-technical users with technology
Online shopping: how to buy something safely from start to finish
articles.escalation_trigger: Suspected fraudulent site, payment dispute, or user discomfort with checkout

articles.title: Comparing products fairly — what specs matter and which are marketing
Vendor / seller research — is this company legit?
Webcam / camera not working in Teams, Zoom, or other apps
articles.escalation_trigger: Camera not detected in Device Manager / System Information after driver reinstall, or hardware shutter physically broken

articles.title: Bluetooth: device won't pair, keeps disconnecting, or audio cuts out
articles.escalation_trigger: Bluetooth radio not detected in Device Manager / System Information at all, or hardware antenna damaged

articles.title: USB device not recognized / unknown device / 'malfunctioned'
articles.escalation_trigger: Same device + same port fails after fresh OS install, or all USB ports fail simultaneously, or BIOS doesn't see USB devices at boot

articles.title: macOS: kernel panic, spinning beach ball, or unexpected restart
keywords: your computer was restarted because of a problem
articles.escalation_trigger: Kernel panic recurs >2x in 24h, panic log identifies a kext (3rd-party kernel extension) or hardware fault, or RAM/SSD diagnostics fail

articles.title: IT asset lifecycle: procurement, deployment, refresh, retirement
articles.escalation_trigger: Lost/stolen device, missing serial in audit, or device returned with sensitive data not wiped

articles.title: VIP / executive / white-glove support workflow
articles.escalation_trigger: VIP issue impacting board meeting, earnings call, customer demo, or live event in next 4 hours

articles.title: BYOD policy: app protection, conditional access, data containers
articles.escalation_trigger: Personal device on shared corporate VPN with no MAM, or jailbroken/rooted device flagged in compliance

articles.title: Older Mac stuck on macOS 10.13-10.15 — app compatibility and security
articles.escalation_trigger: Mac is being used for sensitive business work AND cannot be upgraded; recommend hardware replacement or OpenCore Legacy Patcher per technician judgment.
articles.eol_status: Apple last released security updates for macOS 11 Big Sur Sept 2023. macOS 10.15 Catalina and earlier no longer receive ANY security updates. Browsers and most apps have dropped support — Chrome 120+, Firefox 117+, Safari (capped at the OS version).

articles.title: Office 2010 / 2013 Outlook stopped sending or receiving mail in 2026
articles.escalation_trigger: Customer is dependent on Office 2010/2013 with no upgrade budget AND needs to keep using Microsoft 365 / Exchange Online; engineering needs to design a relay or migration path.
articles.eol_status: Office 2010 EOL 2020-10-13. Office 2013 EOL 2023-04-11. Neither receives security updates or Microsoft 365 / Exchange Online connectivity guarantees.

articles.title: Older HP / Brother / Canon printer stops printing after Windows update
articles.escalation_trigger: Multiple printers fail across the office after a Windows feature update; or the vendor has marked the model 'end of support'; or the customer is on Win Server with print sharing affected.
articles.year_range: Hardware 2008-2017; affected by Windows print stack rewrite 2021+
articles.eol_status: Windows print spooler hardened after PrintNightmare (CVE-2021-34527). Microsoft Universal Print Driver replaced many vendor V3 drivers. Many pre-2017 printer drivers are unsigned or unmaintained.

articles.title: Windows 7 still running in 2026 — security risk, isolation, and safe operation
articles.escalation_trigger: Network-connected Win 7 box handling regulated data (PII/PHI/PCI), or refusing to migrate, or showing signs of compromise.
articles.eol_status: Microsoft mainstream support ended 2015-01-13; extended support ended 2020-01-14; ESU paid program ended 2023-01-10. No further security patches.

articles.title: Office router is WPA2-PSK only — modern devices misbehave, Wi-Fi 6/7 clients drop
articles.escalation_trigger: Office has 30+ devices, multi-floor coverage, or any compliance requirement (PCI-DSS 4.0 requires WPA3 by Mar 2025); design with structured cabling + APs not consumer router.
articles.eol_status: WPA2-PSK still works but loses to KRACK (2017) and is deprecated by WPA3 (2018+). Many enterprise / banking VPN clients now refuse to connect from WPA2-PSK networks.

articles.title: AI coding agents at work — Claude Code, GitHub Copilot agents, Cursor, ChatGPT business use
articles.escalation_trigger: Employee handling regulated data (HIPAA, PCI, GDPR, trade secrets) needs to use AI coding tools → DLP review + appropriate plan tier required before approval.
articles.eol_status: Current. Field moving fast — review article quarterly.

articles.title: macOS 16 Apple Intelligence — features, privacy, and Private Cloud Compute
articles.escalation_trigger: Enterprise customer needs to disable Apple Intelligence org-wide for data sovereignty / compliance → MDM configuration profile required, escalate to L2.
articles.year_range: 2024-present (Apple Intelligence rolled out from macOS 15.1, expanded in macOS 16)
articles.eol_status: Current. Apple typically supports the current macOS plus two prior versions with security updates.

articles.title: Wi-Fi 7 in the office — 320 MHz, MLO, and backward compatibility with Wi-Fi 6/6E/5 clients
articles.escalation_trigger: Deploying Wi-Fi 7 across 20+ APs, multi-floor, or regulated industry → L3 network design with proper spectrum management.
articles.year_range: 2024-present (IEEE 802.11be ratified Jan 2024; first 6 GHz country approvals through 2024-2026)
articles.eol_status: Current. Backward compatible with Wi-Fi 6E, Wi-Fi 6, Wi-Fi 5, Wi-Fi 4 clients.

articles.title: Windows 11 25H1 Copilot+ PC features — Recall, Click to Do, Cocreator, Live Captions
articles.escalation_trigger: Customer is enrolling 10+ Copilot+ PCs at once — design rollout (Recall policies, data governance, group policy) before mass deployment.
articles.eol_status: Current. Microsoft 24-month support window per Windows 11 release.

articles.title: iOS 18 / Android 15 — Apple Intelligence on iPhone, Gemini on Pixel, work profile changes
articles.escalation_trigger: Company-issued device on iOS 18+ / Android 15+ enrolled in MDM and AI features need to be policy-controlled → L2 to configure MDM payload.
articles.year_range: iOS 18 GA Sep 2024; Android 15 GA Oct 2024; iOS 19 / Android 16 expected H2 2026
articles.eol_status: Current. Apple typically 5+ years of iOS updates per device; Google 7 years on Pixel 8+.

articles.title: New Outlook vs Classic Outlook in 2026 — which one to use and how to switch
articles.escalation_trigger: Customer relies on a feature New Outlook doesn't support (PST import for offline work, third-party COM add-ins) and is forced to migrate — assess workflow rework before forcing.
articles.year_range: New Outlook GA 2024; Classic Outlook (Win32) supported through at least 2029 per Microsoft commitment
articles.eol_status: Classic Outlook (Win32) on supported Microsoft 365 Apps tier — patched through Microsoft's Modern Lifecycle. New Outlook is the strategic future.

articles.title: Cisco AnyConnect / Cisco Secure Client — connect to corporate VPN, step by step
articles.escalation_trigger: Connection attempts repeatedly fail with 'login failed' despite correct credentials. Or 'untrusted server certificate' that persists after client update.
articles.year_range: Cisco AnyConnect rebranded to Cisco Secure Client 2022. Both names in use 2026.
articles.eol_status: Current. Use Cisco Secure Client 5.1+ for current security baseline.

articles.title: VPN won't connect — universal triage and when to call IT
articles.escalation_trigger: After the 6 self-fix steps below all fail. Or any time the VPN gateway returns 'access denied' / 'policy violation.'
articles.eol_status: Current. Applies to any SSL VPN / IPsec VPN client (Ivanti, Pulse, GlobalProtect, AnyConnect, FortiClient, OpenVPN, Zscaler ZPA, Cloudflare WARP, Tailscale, NordLayer).

articles.title: Palo Alto GlobalProtect — connect to corporate VPN, step by step
articles.escalation_trigger: Portal authentication fails AND credentials work on webmail. Or HIP (Host Information Profile) check fails repeatedly (device compliance issue).
articles.eol_status: Current. Stay on GP client 6.2+ on Windows and 6.2+ on macOS for current security baseline.

articles.title: Ivanti Secure Access (formerly Pulse Secure) — connect to corporate VPN, step by step
articles.escalation_trigger: User locked out after 5 failed attempts, or gateway URL unreachable from multiple ISPs (likely gateway-side outage), or persistent certificate errors after fresh install.
articles.year_range: Pulse Secure rebranded to Ivanti Secure Access 2021; current as of 2026
articles.eol_status: Current. Note: Ivanti VPN suffered major security incidents (CVE-2023-46805, CVE-2024-21887). Ensure client AND gateway are fully patched.

articles.title: MobilePASS+ — install, enroll, and use for VPN MFA tokens
articles.escalation_trigger: Enrollment link expired AND user has critical VPN need — IT must reissue enrollment from SafeNet Authentication Service / Trusted Access console.
articles.eol_status: Thales (formerly Gemalto / SafeNet) MobilePASS+ is current. Classic MobilePASS EOL March 2025 — must migrate.

articles.title: Pulse Secure (legacy) — same product as Ivanti Secure Access, when you see the old name
articles.escalation_trigger: Company is still on Pulse Secure pre-9.1R12 — major CVEs unpatched. Escalate to L2/L3 for gateway upgrade plan.
articles.year_range: Pulse Secure (Juniper era 2004; rebranded Ivanti Secure Access 2021)
articles.eol_status: Pulse Secure brand discontinued 2021. Current product is Ivanti Secure Access. Older installer versions still work but should be updated.

articles.title: No internet at all — total outage, home or office
articles.escalation_trigger: After 30 minutes of self-fix attempts, internet is still down AND mobile hotspot from a different carrier also has issues (regional outage). Or if your business has an SLA with the ISP — call them immediately.
articles.eol_status: Current. Applies to any consumer or small-business internet connection.

articles.title: Internet is slow but connected — speed troubleshooting
articles.escalation_trigger: Wired speed is more than 30% below the ISP's advertised plan AND modem signal levels are out of spec — escalate to ISP for line work.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Internet drops randomly — intermittent disconnects
articles.escalation_trigger: Modem reboots itself randomly (logs show power-cycle events with no user action) → hardware failure, ISP must replace. Or multiple devices in the office drop simultaneously several times per day → likely AP / switch issue, escalate to L2.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Outlook calendar problems — meetings missing, double-booked, won't sync
articles.escalation_trigger: Calendar shows different events on different devices for the same account AND clearing cache + rebuild profile doesn't fix → Exchange Online sync issue, L2 to check mailbox database / repair calendar.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Out-of-Office (Automatic Replies) — set up correctly for time away
articles.escalation_trigger: User can't set OOO because the option is greyed out in all interfaces — likely admin policy blocking. Escalate to L2 for tenant config check.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: External monitor not detected — laptop won't show video on second screen
articles.escalation_trigger: Monitor works on another laptop but not yours, AND laptop's HDMI / USB-C port doesn't work with any monitor → port hardware failure, requires service ticket / replacement.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Keyboard or mouse not working — wired, wireless, or specific keys
articles.escalation_trigger: Multiple keyboards / mice fail on this laptop AND wired+wireless both fail → laptop USB controller or Bluetooth radio dead. Escalate to L2 / hardware service.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Lost or stolen company device — immediate response protocol
articles.escalation_trigger: ANY lost or stolen device handling work data is automatically a security incident. Notify IT/Security IMMEDIATELY. Do not wait.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Conference room AV not working — projector, mic, camera, Teams Room
articles.escalation_trigger: Conference room hardware physically dead (no power, no display) OR scheduled meeting starting in <5 min and ALL options failing → call IT emergency line for in-person help.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Recover a deleted or lost file — OneDrive, SharePoint, Teams, Recycle Bin
articles.escalation_trigger: File deleted > 30 days ago AND not in any restore path → ticket IT for backup tape / Azure Blob soft-delete recovery (may have additional retention).
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Set up work email on your phone — iPhone, Android, new device
articles.escalation_trigger: MFA succeeds but mobile mail won't sync after 3 attempts AND conditional access policy blocks unknown device → IT to register device or grant exception.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: New work laptop — first-boot setup checklist
articles.escalation_trigger: Autopilot / Jamf enrollment fails to apply policies after 2 attempts → IT to manually re-enroll device.
articles.eol_status: Current

articles.title: Requesting software install on work computer — process and self-serve options
articles.escalation_trigger: Software not in self-serve catalog AND business case is clear (regulated industry tool, compliance need, customer-required) → IT submits formal request through procurement; user notified within 2 business days.
articles.eol_status: Current
